name: LightStyle
summary: Defines enumerated values to represent light styles or types, such as directional or spotlight.

enum_values.name: None
enum_values.summary: No light type. This is the default value of the enumeration type.

enum_values.name: CameraDirectional
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in camera coordinates. +x points to right, +y points up, +z points towards camera.

enum_values.name: CameraPoint
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in camera coordinates. +x points to right, +y points up, +z points towards camera.

enum_values.name: CameraSpot
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in camera coordinates. +x points to right, +y points up, +z points towards camera.

enum_values.name: WorldDirectional
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in world coordinates.

enum_values.name: WorldPoint
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in world coordinates.

enum_values.name: WorldSpot
enum_values.summary: Light location and direction in world coordinates.
